summary: Phase E Voice Actor Studio testing completed successfully. All 15 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests pass - Voice Studio page loads correctly with 3 tabs (Record, Takes, Reels), tab switching works, empty states display properly. Home page shows Voice Studio and Demo Reel tiles in Record section, both link to /voice-studio.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ POST /api/voice-studio/process with operation=normalize - returns normalized audio base64
✅ POST /api/voice-studio/process with operation=trim - returns shorter audio (trim_start/trim_end work)
✅ POST /api/voice-studio/process with operation=remove_silence - removes silent portions
✅ POST /api/voice-studio/demo-reel - concatenates multiple audio files, returns combined reel
✅ POST /api/voice-studio/demo-reel with gaps parameter - adds silence between segments
✅ POST /api/voice-studio/takes - saves take metadata (user_id, take_name, duration, script_id)
✅ GET /api/voice-studio/takes/{user_id} - returns all takes for user with correct data
✅ DELETE /api/voice-studio/takes/{take_id} - deletes take, returns 404 for non-existent
✅ Voice Studio page loads at /voice-studio with Record, Takes (0), Reels tabs
✅ Record tab shows waveform visualization, timer (0:00), 'Ready to record' text, record button
✅ Takes tab shows 'No Takes Yet' empty state with 'Start Recording' button when no takes
✅ Reels tab shows 'Build Demo Reel' button with helper text and 'No Demo Reels' empty state
✅ Tab switching between Record/Takes/Reels works correctly
✅ Home page Record section has Voice Studio and Demo Reel tiles, both link to /voice-studio
test_credentials: No auth needed. Used TEST_ prefixed user IDs for API tests, all cleaned up after tests.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed take metadata during testing, all cleaned up via DELETE after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase E Voice Actor Studio fully implemented and tested. Audio processing endpoints use pydub library for trim/normalize/remove_silence operations. Demo reel builder concatenates audio files with configurable gaps. Take metadata stored in MongoDB voice_takes collection. Frontend uses expo-av for recording (note: deprecated, will be replaced in SDK 54). Tab switching uses local state. All existing Phase C (Daily Drill) and Phase D (Share Links) endpoints still working.

tests_performed.test: Voice Studio page loads with 3 tabs
Takes empty state shows Start Recording
Reels empty state shows Build Demo Reel
Home page Voice Studio tile links to /voice-studio
Home page Demo Reel tile links to /voice-studio
